title: Crispy Light British Citrus Salad
description: This dish features a citrusy, crispy base made with tandoori seasoning and spring onions, served as a light and refreshing salad.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine spring onions and tandoori seasoning. Mix well.
Drizzle peanut oil over the mixture to coat it evenly. Sprinkle with citrus zest and Himalayan salt.
Heat up your pan or skillet with a thin layer of peanut oil until hot but not smoking.
Transfer the seasoned spring onion mixture into the heated oil in batches, ensuring it does not stick. Fry for about 1 minute per side until crispy and golden brown.
Once crispy, remove from heat and let cool slightly before transferring to a plate lined with paper towels to absorb excess oil.
For serving, arrange crispy spring onions on top of iceberg lettuce or spinach leaves. Garnish with fresh mint leaves if desired.
Serve immediately as a light snack or side dish.
